Name: CARRYINGENTITY_CONTENTS_LOOKUP
Description:
CARRYINGENTITY_CONTENTS_LOOKUP

This is a custom process that work in a similar way to the standard lookup process but is specifically for looking at what tracking entities are assigned to the carrying entity.

There is no pagination implemented for the result, so not advisable to use this process for carrying entities with a large number of tracking entities assigned
Author: Gabriel Innes
